title: The Wandering Merchant
description: A travelling merchant moves cell-by-cell through the world. Find them in a non-winter season, befriend them, and buy a forbidden lantern before they vanish.
author: Terminal Quest team

steps.description: Find the wandering merchant somewhere in the shadow realm
The merchant is closed in winter; come back another season
Talk to the existing shop NPC at least once to set the tone
Reach affinity >= 20 with the shop merchant
Carry a merchant-token (proof you transacted before)
Reach level 4 - the merchant only takes seasoned customers

honest.text: The merchant slides the lantern over, takes nothing in return, and is gone before you finish saying thank you.

thief.text: You pocket the lantern when the merchant looks away. They watch you in the polished side of the cart - they know.

fair_trade.text: You hand over a coin, take the lantern, and the merchant moves to the next cell.
